ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tumor_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor sample */,
  "clump_thickness" INTEGER /* Thickness of clump (1-10 scale) */,
  "cell_size_uniformity" INTEGER /* Uniformity in cell size (1-10 scale) */,
  "cell_shape_uniformity" INTEGER /* Uniformity in cell shape (1-10 scale) */,
  "marginal_adherence" INTEGER /* Adhesion level (1-10 scale) */,
  "single_epithelial_cell_size" INTEGER /* Size of single epithelial cells (1-10 scale) */,
  "bare_nuclei" INTEGER /* Number of bare nuclei (0-10 scale) */,
  "bland_chromatin" INTEGER /* Bland chromatin (1-10 scale) */,
  "normal_nucleoli" INTEGER /* Normal nucleoli (1-10 scale) */,
  "mitoses" INTEGER /* Number of mitoses (0-10 scale) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class identifier (1 for benign, 2 for malignant) */,
  "biopsy_date" TEXT /* Date of biopsy */,
  "biopsy_method" TEXT /* Method used for biopsy */,
  "tumor_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tumor */,
  "er_status" TEXT /* Estrogen receptor status of the tumor */,
  "pr_status" TEXT /* Progesterone receptor status of the tumor */,
  "her2_status" TEXT /* Human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 status of the tumor */,
  "tumor_type" TEXT /* Type of tumor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_patient_link" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor sample */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the sample */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the patient and the tumor sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_patient_link_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_patient_link_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES tumor_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor sample */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the tumor */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumor_classifications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES tumor_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the patient */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each tumor sample
Size of single epithelial cells (1-10 scale)
Class identifier (1 for benign, 2 for malignant)
Estrogen receptor status of the tumor
Progesterone receptor status of the tumor
Human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 status of the tumor
ID of the patient associated with the sample
Relationship between the patient and the tumor sample
